home.title: breathe
home.subtitle: A gentle companion that learns how mindfulness works for you — and notices when practice is adding pressure rather than easing it.
watchItems: Continuing when it's making things harder
doesNotItems: No streaks. No scores. No achievements.
No promises about how you'll feel.
home.llmInactive: AI guidance: offline — add OPENAI_API_KEY to .env.local
home.ttsInactive: Voice: text only — add ELEVENLABS_API_KEY to .env.local

session.done: Session saved. Take care of yourself.

checkin.moodLabel: How are you feeling right now?
checkin.tensionLabel: How much tension or pressure do you feel?
checkin.selfCriticalLabel: Are you being hard on yourself today?
checkin.intentLabel: What would feel most useful right now?
checkin.lastSessionLabel: How did your last session go?
checkin.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

reflection.placeholder: Write anything — or just a few words.
reflection.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

guidance.audioUnavailable: Voice not configured. Read the text above.
guidance.audioError: Couldn't load audio. Read the text above.
guidance.worsePlaceholder: Anything you want to say — or leave it blank.

post.pressureQuestion: Did the practice ease the pressure, or add to it?
post.continueQuestion: Would you want to practice again today?
post.notesLabel: Anything to remember for next time?
post.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

crisis.heading: If you need to talk to someone:
resources: Crisis Text Line: Text HOME to 741741
988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline: Call or text 988 (US)
crisis.notDesigned: This app isn't designed for crisis situations. The people above are.
